method: SIGN POSITIONAL-ROLE SPECIALIZATION via ANALYTIC within-word null (supersedes E041; L2/L3). For each sign S with >=15 occurrences (in len>=2 words), test whether S's observed count in INITIAL (index 0) or FINAL (index L-1) within-word position exceeds the EXACT ANALYTIC within-word null: under within-word uniform permutation H0, for a word w of length L containing S exactly k_w times, the probability that a specific position p holds S is k_w/L, independently across words, so the null count of S at p is a POISSON-BINOMIAL over per-word Bernoulli probs p_w=k_w/L_w. One-sided upper-tail p = P(X>=observed) via exact DP/convolution (n_bernoulli<=4000) or normal+continuity-correction (recorded per test). Holm correction across all (sign x position) tests at family alpha 0.05. A sign is POSITION-SPECIALIZED if enriched in initial OR final after Holm. SPECIALIZED_FRACTION = #specialized / #tested. This removes the E041 permutation p-floor (1/2001) that collided with the Holm threshold across ~102 tests. POSITIVE CONTROL on Linear B (DAMOS, anonymous tokens) gates the verdict: DETECT (LB specialized fraction > 0 and > within-word-shuffled LB) AND false-positive (within-word-shuffled LB specialized fraction <=0.10 across >=20 sets). Cross-site held-out per site with >=200 word-tokens; leave-one-site-out on Haghia Triada. Pure L2/L3 statistics on ANONYMOUS sign ids; no phonetics/sound/meaning/reading. 'specialized' is a positional-distribution statistic, NOT a morpheme-with-meaning.
result: Linear A sign POSITIONAL-ROLE SPECIALIZATION (analytic within-word null, E041 p-floor removed). POSITIVE CONTROL PASSED: on Linear B (DAMOS, anonymous tokens) the analytic machinery detects a specialized fraction of 0.526 (41/78 signs; 24 initial + 17 final) versus 0.0006 on within-word-shuffled LB (false-positive rate 0.0006 <= 0.10 across 20 sets; max shuffled frac 0.0128). The machinery is INFORMATIVE (E041's MACHINERY_UNINFORMATIVE was a permutation p-floor artifact, now fixed). LA GLOBAL: of 51 signs tested (>=15 occ in 1369 len>=2 words), 17 (0.333) are position-specialized after Holm — 6 initial-specialized (word-starter tendency) and 11 final-specialized (word-ending tendency). The final-specialized signs show strong ending concentration (e.g. one sign at 0.848 final rate, holm_p~1e-13); initial-specialized signs show strong starter concentration (e.g. one at 0.906 initial, holm_p~1e-59). CROSS-SITE: only 1 site (Haghia Triada) has >=200 word-tokens (per-site fraction 0.306); leave-one-site-out excluding HT gives fraction 0.220 on 675 words. The global signal (0.333) and LOO signal (0.220) both exceed 0.20 and the per-site HT fraction (0.306) exceeds 0.15, BUT the frozen cross-site gate requires >=3 sites with >=200 tokens, which the LA corpus does not satisfy (only HT qualifies; next-largest sites Zakros=132, Khania=120 fall below 200). Verdict: SPECIALIZATION_UNDERPOWERED — the positional-specialization signal is present and the machinery is now informative, but the cross-site robustness test cannot be executed at the preregistered >=200-token threshold.
key_findings: ANALYTIC NULL FIX SUCCEEDED: replacing E041's permutation draws (p-floor 1/2001) with the exact Poisson-binomial within-word null made the positive control PASS — LB specialized fraction 0.526 vs 0.0006 shuffled (false-positive 0.0006 <= 0.10). E041's MACHINERY_UNINFORMATIVE was a p-floor artifact, not a real null result.

LA shows a SUBSTANTIAL positional-specialization signal: 17/51 signs (0.333) are Holm-specialized, split 11 final-specialized vs 6 initial-specialized. The final-heavy split is consistent with templatic/slot-like word structure (word-ending signs).

Final-specialized signs concentrate strongly at word ends (rates up to 0.848, holm_p down to ~1e-13); initial-specialized signs concentrate strongly at word starts (rates up to 0.906, holm_p down to ~1e-59). Both tails are far above the within-word null.

CROSS-SITE TEST IS UNDERPOWERED at the preregistered >=200-token threshold: only Haghia Triada (694 tokens) qualifies; the next sites (Zakros=132, Khania=120) fall short. The frozen >=3-site gate cannot be met by the current LA corpus.

Leave-one-site-out (excluding Haghia Triada) on 675 words still yields specialized fraction 0.220 (>=0.20), and the HT-only fraction is 0.306 — the signal is not an HT-only artifact, but this is a single-site + pooled-LOO check, NOT the >=3-site cross-site robustness the verdict rule demands.
successor_hypotheses: E043: Re-run the cross-site test at a LOWER per-site token threshold (e.g. >=80 or >=100 tokens, which yields 3 sites: HT, Khania, Zakros) PREREGISTERED in advance, to test whether the positional-specialization signal is robust across sites — this directly addresses the underpowering that blocks HIGH_POSITIONAL_SPECIALIZATION_CROSS_SITE.

E044: Add a MEDIAL position to the analytic test (3 positions) and ask whether medial-specialized signs exist, completing the initial/medial/final slot picture; the analytic Poisson-binomial extends trivially to a third slot.

E045: Test whether the final-specialized LA signs CO-OCCUR with (or are mutually exclusive of) the initial-specialized signs within the same words — a templatic 'frame' (fixed starter + fixed ending) would predict complementary co-occurrence; this is an L2/L3 co-occurrence test, no meaning assigned.

E046: Compare the LA final-specialized fraction against the LB final-specialized fraction quantitatively (effect size + bootstrap CI on the difference) to ask whether LA has WEAKER or STRONGER positional templating than LB's known case-ending structure.

E047: Permute signs ACROSS words of the SAME length (a between-word null) as a stricter alternative null, and check whether the within-word analytic null and the between-word null agree on the specialized set — a robustness check on the null choice.
E048: Stratify the positional-specialization test by word LENGTH (len 2 vs 3 vs >=4) to ask whether specialization is driven by short formulaic 2-sign words or holds across the length distribution.
non_circular: Signs carry NO phonetic/sound/meaning/reading. All statistics are pure L2/L3 positional-distribution tests on ANONYMOUS sign ids (anonymized to S01..S17 in outputs). LB is a positive-control benchmark ONLY; its deciphered values are not used in any LA inference. The Poisson-binomial null is derived purely from word lengths and per-word sign multiplicities — no external linguistic knowledge. 'specialized' is a positional-distribution statistic, NOT a morpheme-with-meaning; no sign is named as a suffix/prefix/case-ending. The verdict is a structural statistic, not a decipherment.
deviations: DATA_DIR path in run_full.py was initially mis-resolved (EPOCH_DIR/.. instead of EPOCH_DIR/../..); corrected to the PATH CONTRACT path experiments/linear_a_frontier_72h/data/epoch_042/. No data or analysis changed; only the output location.

Medial position (defined in E041 for len>=3 words) was DROPPED for E042 per the task spec, which restricts the question to initial-vs-final slot specialization. This is a frozen scope decision, not a data-dependent choice.
Sign occurrence threshold uses total TOKEN occurrences in len>=2 words (matching E041 and the spec wording '>=15 occurrences'), not word-presence count. 51 LA signs and 78 LB signs qualify.
All LA tests used exact_convolution (n_bernoulli <= 4000 for every tested sign); no normal approximation was needed. Method recorded per test in the raw _run_full.json.
